sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kisialh pih ding bangmah om kei;
Ka deih bel teng khat zong
Ama’ si khek na in ka nei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: En ven, a lu a khut, a khe,
Dahna, itna hong luang suk khawm;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tamlua ka ci ngei kei ding hi;
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.
